title: Ribogreen Assay - 2 Standards and up to 8 Samples
author: Opentrons
description: Links: * [Part 1](./2ed4de) * [Part 2](./2ed4de-2) This is a protocol for the Flu Ribogreen Assay protocol. Samples are aligned in the sample tuberack (slot 1) in the following order: * A1 -> sample 1 * B1 -> sample 2 * C1 -> sample 3 * D1 -> sample 4 * A2 -> sample 5 * B2 -> sample 6 * C2 -> sample 7 * D2 -> sample 8 ---
steps_raw: Links: * [Part 1](./2ed4de) * [Part 2](./2ed4de-2) This is a protocol for the Flu Ribogreen Assay protocol. Samples are aligned in the sample tuberack (slot 1) in the following order: * A1 -> sample 1 * B1 -> sample 2 * C1 -> sample 3 * D1 -> sample 4 * A2 -> sample 5 * B2 -> sample 6 * C2 -> sample 7 * D2 -> sample 8 ---
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 1.5 mL Screwcap Tubes or equivalent
